title: ribes multiflorum subsp. sandalioticum
intro: Ribes multiflorum subsp. sandalioticum, also known as the Sicilian currant or sandaliotic currant, is a plant species within the currant family, native to the Mediterranean region. The leaves and fruits of the plant have been used in traditional medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential antiviral properties. Ribes multiflorum subsp. sandalioticum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
